hero.body: Birdie is Amman’s premium indoor golf and social destination — combining advanced golf simulators, expert coaching, group experiences, memberships, and a vibrant lounge atmosphere in one unforgettable venue.
hero.headline: Where Golf Meets Entertainment

visit.body: Plan your next session, event, or visit and experience Birdie for yourself.
visit.heading: Visit Birdie

community.body: Stay updated on memberships, events, offers, and new experiences at Birdie.
community.heading: Join the Birdie Community

golfFeatures.body: Explore world-famous courses through immersive simulator play.
golfFeatures.title: 80+ Premier Courses

golfFeatures.body: Use technology-driven feedback to better understand and improve your game.
golfFeatures.title: Advanced Swing Analysis

golfFeatures.body: Train with practice modes and drills designed for precision, consistency, and measurable progress.
golfFeatures.title: Skill-Building Tools

golfFeatures.body: New to golf? Birdie makes the game accessible, welcoming, and enjoyable from the start.
golfFeatures.title: Beginner-Friendly Experience

testimonials.quote: Paradise for golf lovers in Amman.
testimonials.author: Birdie Guest

experienceMix.body: Book simulator sessions for training, casual play, or virtual course experiences.
experienceMix.title: Practice & Play

experienceMix.body: Work with a golf professional to improve technique, confidence, and consistency.
experienceMix.title: Coaching & Lessons

experienceMix.body: Enjoy better value and greater flexibility through options designed for regular players and returning guests.
experienceMix.title: Memberships & Packages

experienceMix.body: Host birthdays, team outings, private gatherings, and celebrations in a venue built for shared experiences.
experienceMix.title: Group Events

experienceMix.body: Enjoy Birdie beyond golf with a lively hospitality atmosphere that keeps the experience social and memorable.
experienceMix.title: Lounge & Entertainment

brandStatement.body: At Birdie, golf is only part of the experience. We bring together practice, play, coaching, entertainment, events, and hospitality to create a destination that welcomes serious golfers, casual visitors, friends, families, and groups alike.
brandStatement.heading: More Than Just a Golf Simulator Venue

experienceCards.body: Experience world-class indoor golf through immersive simulator play, realistic virtual courses, and flexible sessions for all levels.
experienceCards.title: Golf Simulators

experienceCards.body: Choose from flexible options for one-time sessions, repeat visits, golf lessons, and curated playing packages.
experienceCards.title: Packages & Rates

experienceCards.body: Relax before, during, or after your session in a venue designed for comfort, social time, and entertainment.
experienceCards.title: Lounge & Bar

experienceCards.body: From birthdays and private gatherings to work outings and celebrations, Birdie offers memorable group experiences built around fun and interaction.
experienceCards.title: Events & Group Bookings

membershipPromo.body: Birdie offers lesson packages, simulator hour bundles, and membership options designed for beginners, improving golfers, and regular players who want better value and more time in the game.
membershipPromo.heading: Flexible Ways to Play

signatureSection.body: Whether you are coming to practice, learn, compete, celebrate, or simply enjoy a different kind of night out, Birdie offers a premium indoor environment designed around atmosphere, play, and connection.

data.sectionBody: Discover the experiences that make Birdie one of Amman's most distinctive indoor destinations.

data.body: Whether you are coming to practice, learn, compete, celebrate, or simply enjoy a different kind of night out, Birdie offers a premium indoor environment designed around atmosphere, play, and connection.
data.heading: Book Your Next Experience at Birdie

data.title: Hear From Our Guests
data.quote_1: Paradise for golf lovers in Amman. The simulators are world-class and the atmosphere is unmatched.
data.quote_2: Best place in the city to practice your swing. Whether you're a beginner or seasoned player, Birdie delivers.
data.quote_3: We hosted our team event here and it was absolutely brilliant. Everyone had an amazing time.
data.subtitle: Guests return to Birdie for the atmosphere, the energy, and the experience.

resolvedCssVars.--bf-font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
resolvedCssVars.--bf-selection-bg: color-mix(in srgb, rgba(24, 74, 58, 0.88) 40%, color-mix(in srgb, rgba(24, 74, 58, 0.88) 70%, black) 60%)
resolvedCssVars.--bf-pill-selected-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, rgba(24, 74, 58, 0.88) 22%, transparent), 0 10px 26px color-mix(in srgb, rgba(24, 74, 58, 0.88) 16%, transparent)
